message:
refactor(fcp-host): modernize admin_state match patterns to functional style

Convert three nested match statements to map_or_else() for cleaner
functional control flow. Replace three nested if-let-Some patterns with
guard clause conjunction (&&) to reduce indentation depth. Add doc
comment to validate_config() explaining error conditions.

All changes are functionally equivalent with no logic modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
